summary: Mechanical code-style PR that ran clang-format across the repository's src files. GitHub metadata reports 789 changed files with 4341 additions and 3858 deletions, but the PR diff was too large for the dump slice. The decomp.dev GALE01 report said "No changes", indicating the formatting-only edits did not affect the built binary for the checked target.

key_files.reason: PR title says clang-format was run on all src files; exact changed-file list is not available in this slice because the diff exceeded GitHub's 300-file diff limit.

what_changed: Ran clang-format on source files under src according to the PR title.
Applied a broad mechanical formatting update: PR metadata reports 789 changed files, 4341 added lines, and 3858 deleted lines.
The stored diff is unavailable because GitHub returned HTTP 406: the diff exceeded the maximum number of files.
smart_moves: Kept the PR focused on formatting rather than mixing style churn with functional decomp changes.
Relied on decomp.dev validation: the bot reported GALE01 had "No changes", which is important evidence for a non-functional formatting sweep.
Used the repository's clang-format convention/tooling rather than hand-formatting individual files.
decomp_lessons: Large formatting sweeps should be isolated from matching or symbol work so future archaeology can distinguish mechanical churn from semantic changes.
For decompilation projects, style-only C formatting is acceptable only when binary comparison remains unchanged; here the available GALE01 report says "No changes".
When a PR touches hundreds of files, preserve file lists or local diffs elsewhere because GitHub's PR diff endpoint may refuse oversized diffs.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use decomp.dev or equivalent build comparison after mechanical formatting to confirm no object/binary differences.
The GALE01 report covered commit range 7fea458 to 86b3b1f and reported no changes, supporting that clang-format did not disturb matching output.

review_feedback.feedback: No human review comments were present in the slice.

searchable_terms: Run clang-format on all src files
follow_up_queries: large formatting sweep decomp matching no changes
